case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. NYOKIE FRANKLIN

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, NYOKIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, NYOKIE $4,270.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,335.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.99 SERVED NOV-17-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, NYOKIE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $145.01 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY CREDITOR $100 PER MONTH STARTING FEBRUARY 1, 2015 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
